nav.title: TW Stock
nav.search_placeholder: Ticker or name, e.g. 2330 / AAPL / Apple

market.big_orders_title: 🔥 Big Orders Today (large single trades, live intraday)
market.institutional_net_caption: Institutional Net Buy/Sell (lots, source: TWSE listed)
market.sector_flow_caption: Sector Money Flow (institutional net buy/sell, lots)

inst.title: Institutional Open Interest (Net Contracts, Last 30 Days)
inst.note: Net contracts = open long − short positions; positive = bullish bias, negative = bearish bias. Source: FinMind.

macro.title: Macro · Economy
macro.subtitle: 5-layer framework: Macro → Liquidity → Price Action → Sentiment → Geopolitics. Data from Yahoo Finance
macro.fred_unavailable_list: CPI / GDP / NFP / Fed Funds / Unemployment

liquidity.rate_intro: Rates = cost of capital. 10Y Treasury yield
liquidity.bullet_high_rate: High rates → money back to bonds → pressure on stocks / gold
liquidity.bullet_low_rate: Low rates → money flows to stocks / risk assets
liquidity.bullet_strong_dxy: Strong DXY → capital flows back to US → pressure on emerging markets / gold

fx.note: USD/TWD ↑ favors exporters (semiconductors/electronics); USD/JPY ↑ pressures Japanese stocks / Asian bonds

sentiment.footnote: PCR > 1.2 usually signals "excessive fear" (contrarian buy signal); < 0.7 "excessive optimism" (contrarian caution). An inverted yield curve has historically preceded recession within 6-18 months.

geopolitics.watch: Watch list: wars (Russia-Ukraine, Middle East) / US elections / sanctions / oil supply chains
geopolitics.jump_button: Go to the "Global" page for the latest news →

calendar.footnote: 🔴 high / 🟡 medium / ⚪ low · Source: Finnhub · German state-level entries, Prel interim revisions and holiday noise filtered out

fundamentals.insider_note: Form 4 = buy/sell activity filed by insiders (CEO/CFO/Director/10% holders) within 2 business days; heavy CEO buying is usually a strong bullish signal, while sustained selling (outside an automated sell plan) is a warning sign.
fundamentals.rating_summary: Strong Buy {strongBuy} · Buy {buy} · Hold {hold} · Sell {sell} · Strong Sell {strongSell} (total {total})

chip.sec_lend_hint: Rising lending volume usually means institutions are building short positions; a rising fee means shares are hard to borrow (high short-squeeze risk)

outlook.expected_heading: Expectation ({horizon_days} trading days, estimated from historical backtest)
outlook.low_sample_warning: ⚠ Small sample size ({sample_count} occurrences); low reliability
outlook.no_expected_fallback: No clear backtest signal to estimate expectation; refer to support {support}, resistance {resistance}.
outlook.disclaimer: This outlook combines technical, institutional-flow, and 10-year backtest statistics for research reference only — not investment advice. Past statistics do not guarantee future results and exclude transaction costs.

global.title: Global Markets · Geopolitics
global.subtitle: Asia, Europe, US markets + geopolitical keywords · Source: Google News · 30-min backend cache
global.no_recent_news: No news in the past 36 hours

watchlist.title: Watchlist
watchlist.description: Track stocks and conditions; refreshing the page re-evaluates current status (no push notifications). A future Go alert engine will use this table for per-tick pushes.
watchlist.condition_examples: e.g. 2330 RSI < 30 (oversold, buy) / 2454 KD K > 80 (overbought warning) / 0050 Close > 150
watchlist.empty_state: No stocks watched yet. Enter a ticker to start tracking →
watchlist.live_note: Top 5 stream live (Fugle free tier: 5 max)

compare.title: Stock Comparison · Compare
compare.subtitle: Overlay multiple stocks/commodities normalized to 100 to compare relative strength. Taiwan tickers or international commodities (GC/SPX/BTC...) are supported. Up to 6 lines.
compare.input_placeholder: Enter a ticker, e.g. 2330 / 2454 / 0050 / GC / SPX / BTC
compare.footnote: All series are based at 100 on the first candle of the range to show relative strength. For example, 2330 going 100→130 vs 2454 going 100→110 means 2330 outperformed 2454 by 20% over the period.

signal.rsi_bear_div: RSI Bearish Divergence (price high, RSI lower)

screen.title: 📈 Bullish-setup screen · multi-factor
screen.disclaimer: Research signals, not investment advice; EOD data, no backtest, past ≠ future.

scan_panel.intro_title: Three-MA Convergence Volume Breakout of MA60 — Full Market Scan
scan_panel.intro_triggered_desc: : MA5/10/20 converged (gap < 3%) + yesterday on volume (> 1.5× avg) + held above MA60 for 2 days + still below MA60 the day before
scan_panel.intro_setup_desc: : Three MAs converged + close above MA5/MA10/MA20 + within 3% of MA60 (awaiting volume breakout)
scan_panel.intro_hint: Click "Rescan" to start. The first run takes about 10–60s depending on DB size; later runs return from cache.
scan_panel.loading_text: Scanning patterns across all Taiwan stocks, please wait…
scan_panel.triggered_badge: Volume breakout of MA60, confirmed holding for 2 days
scan_panel.setup_badge: Three MAs converged + within 3% of MA60, awaiting breakout confirmation
scan_panel.disclaimer: Historical patterns do not indicate future performance; for research reference only.

wbottom_panel.scanning_first_hint: Scanning, the first run takes about 30–90 seconds…
wbottom_panel.cond1_desc: This week's close just crossed above the weekly MA20 (still below last week)
wbottom_panel.cond2_desc: Weekly MA20 sloping up (this week > 3 weeks ago, MA turning bullish)
wbottom_panel.cond3_desc: W-bottom formed within the last 40 weeks (higher lows + a peak in between)
wbottom_panel.cond4_desc: Volume surge this week (> 1.5× the 10-week average volume)
wbottom_panel.intro_footer: Click “Rescan” to start. The first run takes about 30–90 seconds depending on DB size; later runs return cached results instantly.
wbottom_panel.scanning_full_market: Scanning weekly patterns across all Taiwan stocks, please wait…
wbottom_panel.four_conditions_met: All four conditions met simultaneously (weekly K)
wbottom_panel.no_matches: No stocks match the weekly W-bottom breakout today
wbottom_panel.disclaimer: Past patterns do not guarantee future performance; for research reference only.

reason.near_ma60: Close is just {gap} ({gapPct}%) from MA60 ({ma60}), awaiting breakout
reason.near_ma60_pending: Close within 3% of MA60, awaiting volume breakout
reason.support: Yesterday's volume {prevVol} lots > threshold {threshold} lots (avg volume x 1.5)
reason.support_pending: Yesterday's volume must exceed 20-day avg x 1.5 (volume breakout)
reason.above_ma20: Close above MA60 ({ma60}) for 2 days; today's {close} confirms the hold
reason.above_ma20_pending: Both today's and yesterday's close above MA60 (held for 2 days)
reason.first_break: Two days ago close {prevClose} was still below MA60 ({prevMa60}); breakout just occurred
reason.first_break_pending: Two days ago still below MA60; breakout just occurred
reason.ma60_up: MA60 sloping up (slope +{slope}); no long-term resistance, strongest momentum
reason.ma60_down: MA60 still sloping down (slope {slope}); MA hasn't turned yet, explosive-type signal

pattern_panel.backtest_disclaimer: Excludes commissions and transaction tax; past performance does not indicate future results.
pattern_panel.breakout_section_title: 2. Breakout Confirmation (fully triggered only when met; basis for backtest)
pattern_panel.footer_disclaimer: Historical patterns do not indicate future performance; for reference only.
